sql.if: AND (t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.content_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT t.template_id, t.title, t.content_text, t.image_url, t.category, t.is_active, t.deleted_at FROM TB_NTALK_SEND_TEMPLATE t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY t.template_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NTALK_SEND_TEMPLATE t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT t.template_id, t.title, t.content_text, t.image_url, t.category, t.is_active, t.deleted_at FROM TB_NTALK_SEND_TEMPLATE t WHERE t.template_id = #{templateId} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NTALK_SEND_TEMPLATE SET title = #{title}, content_text = #{contentText}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, category = #{category}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE template_id = #{templateId}

UPDATE TB_NTALK_SEND_TEMPLATE SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE template_id IN
#{id}
